{{Quote|Well, enough for now. I must get some rest if I'm to meet with Captain Flin about the memorial fund.|Arhul Hextrophon in a personal communication to [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|<ref name="RJ" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Flin''' was an officer who served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the time of the [[Second Battle of Coruscant]], Flin met with [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] to discuss a memorial fund.
